items.title: Just $45 today gets you this Anker 4-in-1 charging kit with 45W USB-C charger, 67W 3-port car charger, more (55% off)
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on charging accessories, Woot is now offering an Anker 4-in-1 charging kit for $44.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This particular bundle, which includes a 45W USB-C wall charger, a 67W 3-port USB-C car charger, and two USB-C cables measuring 3 feet and 6 feet, carries a $100 listed price, so you’re looking at a straight-up 55% discount on it right now. You get a great value for your money here, especially considering the 67W 3-port car charger alone is currently selling for $40 at Amazon. On top of that, the additional accessories round out a complete setup for both home and on-the-go charging. Deals like this tend to move quickly, so it may be worth grabbing this while the discount is still available.

Amazon is now offering Razer’s Pro Click V2 vertical wireless mouse for $94.99 shipped. This model debuted alongside the standard Pro Click V2 last year with a $120 price tag. While the regular version has seen a few discounts since launch, the vertical Pro Click V2 has only been discounted once before today. With a 21% discount, this unit is now back to the lowest price we first tracked for it last month. The standard Pro Click V2 is also on sale right now for $79.99 shipped. Head below for more details.

items.title: Don’t miss Lexar’s 4TB SL500 portable SSD while it’s down to its lowest since price hike (Now 44% off)
items.summary:
We’re now tracking a deal at B&H that drops Lexar’s SL500 4TB portable SSD to $319.99 shipped, thanks to a hefty $270 coupon that automatically applies at checkout. Like many other drives, this model saw a major price jump late last year, climbing from around $350 to as high as $580. It hasn’t seen many meaningful discounts since then, aside from a brief dip to $322 at Amazon earlier this year, and today’s B&H offer edges slightly below that mark. This is the lowest price we’ve tracked for the drive since the price hike, and it’s a great price for a 4TB SSD in today’s higher-priced market.
